title: medieval smp S4
description: this is, lets say a sort of "kitchen sink" medieval pack, tho not finished
body:
A small side project I made for my friends and myself which includes:
* all of Epic knights addon
* farmer's delight 
* the let's do mods (brewery, farm & charm and vinery)
* immersive mods (subtle effects, dynamic lights, immersive melodies)
* performance mods
* and emotes!
